info.viSezaH: DAtupAWe vidyamAnam idam gaRasUtram asti  'yam (aparivezaRe)' iti BvAdigaRasya DAtoH janIjFznkasuraYjo'mantASca (1.934) ityanena pUrvagaRasUtreRa prAptaM mittvaM anena gaRasUtreRa niziDyate  yam-DAtuH 'aparivezaRam' asmin arTe prayujyate cet saH mit na grAhyaH iti asya gaRasUtrasya arTaH  ataeva 'AyAmayati' ityatra upaDAdIrGe kfte rUpaM sidDyati  anyezu arTezu (yaTA yam parivezaRe iti cOrAdikasya) tu 'yamayati' ityeva rUpam
